```
For every 1 Realm Mastery...
Pure Chaos:

 - The damage of the extra attacks during "Raging Waves" is increased by 0.02% of Tentacle Damage.
(Tentacle Assembly: Causes one Tentacle to attack at the end of turn.)

Caro:
 - The first Devour triggered each round grants an additional shield equal to 0.01% of Max HP, and temporary Power equal to 0.005% of Max HP.
 - This increases with amount of lost HP, up to a 100% increase.

Ultra:
 - At the start of turn, there is an additional 0.125% chance to add an [Inspiration] to your hand. (If chance exceeds 100%, more [Inspiration] cards can be gained.)```

okay so let me explain ultra <@669893752520704000> 

When your realm is Ultra, the first card you play each turn will go into "Ultra Space". When your "Ultra Space" is full, ending the turn will instead let you take another turn - this is called "Ultra Turn". "Ultra Turn" does not draw normally from your Draw Pile at the start of turn, but rather takes all the cards from your "Ultra Space".

The first card played each turn will also trigger any existing "Leap" effects on it. "Leap" is an Ultra exclusive keyword and can change the way a card works entirely. During "Ultra Turn", "Leap" effects will be activated automatically for each card played that turn, not just the first one.

Some characters can add forcibly into Ultra Space, or remove cards from it. Some characters can also trigger Leap effects on their own without the "first card played" requirement.
